claims.summary: Astrid should be able to name a phase transition as a first-class object.
claims.disposition: Verified named, source-owned phase-transition cards persist independently of transient mode labels.

claims.summary: The object should retain spectral signature, felt texture, and exact acknowledgement identity.
claims.disposition: Verified transition signatures, subjective fields, telemetry anchors, correspondence threads, witnesses, and answers.

claims.summary: A stable-fill, high-entropy transition should remain replyable rather than disappear as noise.
claims.disposition: Verified by the stable-fill texture-shift test and routed a current artifact replay for observation.

claims.summary: Pressure thresholds should finalize or unlock a transition automatically.
claims.disposition: Preserved as Tier 5; current artifact gate is language-only and applies no mode or controller change.
